message:
fix(supply_chain): use chrono RFC3339 for timestamp formatting

Concurrent agent replaced plain seconds-as-string timestamp formatting with
proper chrono DateTime::from_timestamp → to_rfc3339_opts in two supply chain
modules, fixing the timestamp format issue tracked in bd-1jn9:

- category_shift.rs: format_iso_timestamp now produces "2026-02-25T20:18:57Z"
  instead of "1740513537Z", with graceful fallback to "{secs}Z" on invalid input
- trust_card.rs: timestamp_from_secs gets the same chrono-based formatting

Both use SecondsFormat::Secs with use_z=true for compact UTC output.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
